title: packages/schema skeleton with shared Block and PreviewConfig types
description: Define the shared TypeScript types consumed by server, admin, and connector: the `Block` union (matching the data model's block `tipo` field) and a placeholder export for `PreviewConfig` (fully defined later in TASK-37). This package is the single source of truth for cross-package content typing.
acceptanceCriteria: `packages/schema/src/block.ts` exports a discriminated union `Block` covering `heading | paragraph | list | code | image | table | callout | component-embed`
Each `Block` variant has a `type` discriminant field and a `content` field typed to its shape (e.g. `heading` has `level` and Tiptap JSON content; `list` has `ordered: boolean` and items)
`packages/schema/src/preview-config.ts` exports a placeholder `PreviewConfig` type (to be finalized in TASK-37) so imports don't break
Package builds with `tsc --noEmit` with zero type errors
`apps/server` and `apps/admin` can import `Block` from `@systembook/schema` without module resolution errors

steps.details: In `packages/schema/src/block.ts`, define `type BlockType = 'heading' | 'paragraph' | 'list' | 'code' | 'image' | 'table' | 'callout' | 'component-embed'` and a discriminated union `Block` with `{ id: string; tabId: string; type: BlockType; content: unknown; ordem: number }` as base, refined per-type where useful.

steps.description: Type the callout and component-embed block content shapes
steps.details: `CalloutBlockContent` has `variant: 'info' | 'warning' | 'tip'` plus Tiptap JSON body. `ComponentEmbedBlockContent` has `componentName: string`, `variantId: string | null` (null until a variant is picked).

In `packages/schema/src/preview-config.ts`, export a minimal `interface PreviewConfig { component: string; variants: unknown[]; controls: unknown[] }` with a comment noting it will be finalized in TASK-37.
In `apps/server/src/index.ts`, add `import type { Block } from '@systembook/schema'` and confirm `tsc --noEmit` passes at the workspace root.

technicalNotes: Keep `Block.content` loosely typed (`unknown` narrowed per-variant) rather than fully modeling Tiptap's JSON schema â€” Tiptap's node JSON shape is verified at the editor layer (TASK-25+), not re-validated here.
This package must have zero runtime dependencies â€” types only â€” to stay lightweight for the connector, which is a separate npm-publishable package.
